task: Redesign the Lyzane admin panel to carry the storefront's brand identity (charcoal/brass/burgundy, Playfair/Josefin typography) instead of generic gray-900/MUI-default styling
design_principles: Admin stays dense and functional, not cinematic like the storefront — polish comes from color/typography consistency, not motion or 3D

Replace MUI default role colors (primary blue, error red, success green) with brand-mapped colors: burgundy for primary metrics, brass for 'liked/favorite' metrics, charcoal for neutral/inventory metrics
Status badges become rounded pills with brand-tinted backgrounds instead of MUI's default solid Chip colors
Sidebar active state uses a left accent bar in brass plus a faint tinted background, not a flat solid gray-800 fill
Background warms from flat gray-50 to a warm off-white (#faf9f7) consistent with the storefront's cream tone
Login page adopts the actual brand font/logo treatment instead of generic 'Sign In' card styling

changes.description: Replace plain 'Lyzane' text header with the actual brand font treatment and a brass eyebrow label
changes.remove:
Lyzane

/

Admin Panel
add_jsx: Manager portal
changes.notes: font-brand class already defined in globals.css per spec section 2.3, no new CSS needed

changes.description: Replace flat active-state background with a left accent bar + tinted background using brass
changes.add: Active: border-l-2 border-brass bg-brass/10 text-cream. Inactive stays text-cream/45 hover:text-cream hover:bg-cream/5
changes.example_jsx: <Link className={`flex items-center gap-2.5 px-3 py-2.5 border-l-2 transition-colors ${isActive ? 'border-brass bg-brass/10 text-cream' : 'border-transparent text-cream/45 hover:text-cream hover:bg-cream/5'}`}>

changes.description: Replace MUI default primary/error/success icon colors with brand-mapped circular icon badges
changes.remove: MUI Grid cards using color='primary' | 'error' | 'success' on icons (ShoppingCart, Favorite, Inventory)
add: Orders card: icon badge background rgba(114,47,55,0.1), icon color #722f37 (burgundy)
Most Liked card: icon badge background rgba(181,152,90,0.15), icon color #8a6d2f (brass, darkened for contrast)
Products card: icon badge background rgba(26,26,26,0.06), icon color #1a1a1a (charcoal)
changes.structure_note: Each card: 32px circle icon badge above the value, value in 22px/500 weight, label below in 12px muted gray, matching the storefront's metric-card visual weight rather than raw MUI Card defaults

changes.description: Warm the admin background from flat gray-50 to match the storefront's cream tone
changes.remove: bg-gray-50 (outer admin layout and main content area)

changes.description: Replace the MUI Select-based status renderer's default coloring with brand-mapped pill badges for the read display state (Select control itself remains functional/unstyled for editing)
changes.notes: Apply as inline style or a small statusStyles lookup object keyed by the existing status enum; pill shape via border-radius: 20px, padding 3px 10px, font-size 11px

changes.description: Add a small initials-avatar next to customerName in the DataGrid renderer for visual rhythm, matching the storefront's data-record card pattern
changes.add: 24px circle, background #ebebeb, initials derived from customerName.split(' ').map(w => w[0]).join('').slice(0,2).toUpperCase(), font-size 10px, color #6b6b6b

changes.description: Add a small square thumbnail preview (first image in product.images[]) as the first column of the products table, currently text-only
changes.add: 40x40px thumbnail, object-cover, rounded 6px, fallback to a muted placeholder square with a 'M' letter matching the storefront's ProductGallery fallback style if no image exists

changes.description: Replace default MUI Chip Active/Archived coloring with brand-tinted pills consistent with the orders status badges
Override MUI X BarChart default blue palette with brand colors
changes.remove: Default MUI X Charts color palette (blue-based)
changes.add: colors prop on BarChart: ['#722f37', '#b5985a'] — burgundy for Most Viewed chart series, brass for Most Liked chart series
changes.notes: MUI X Charts BarChart accepts a colors array prop; pass it directly rather than theming globally to avoid affecting other MUI components admin-wide

changes.description: Replace generic 'Sign In' card styling with the actual brand identity
changes.remove: text-3xl font-brand text-gray-900 header + bg-gray-50 page background + bg-gray-900 submit button
add: Page background: bg-charcoal (matches storefront navbar/dark sections) instead of bg-gray-50
Header: font-brand text-cream for 'Lyzane', text-brass text-sm tracking-wide mt-1 for 'Manager portal' subtitle
Form card: bg-white rounded-lg border border-border shadow-sm p-8 (unchanged structure, sits on the new dark page background for contrast)
Submit button: bg-charcoal -> bg-burgundy text-white hover:bg-charcoal, consistent with storefront primary actions

verification_steps: Confirm sidebar active nav item shows the brass left border + tinted background and inactive items remain legible at reduced opacity
Confirm dashboard metric card icon badges use the three mapped brand colors, not MUI defaults
Confirm status pills across Orders and Products use the shared color map consistently (same 'confirmed'/'active' green across both pages)
Confirm analytics BarCharts render in burgundy/brass instead of default blue
Confirm login page reads clearly on the new charcoal background (form card contrast, label legibility)
Confirm no MUI default theme override leaks into unrelated MUI components outside admin (DataGrid pagination controls, Select dropdowns should remain default MUI styling unless explicitly restyled)
Test dashboard/orders/products pages at tablet width (DataGrid horizontal scroll should still work)
